title: Introducing ✨ Feature Finder! ✨

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting announcement!

Head over to our @mondaysupport Twitter account today to participate in a brand new game that will put your monday knowledge to the test: Feature Finder!

Prove your platform prowess and win monday swag! Rules below!

Introducing FeatureFinder! - purple1088×1088 52.6 KB

Throughout the day we will post 4 partial screenshots of a feature or setting on our platform.

In order to win, you must:

  1. Follow both mondaysupport and mondaydotcom on Twitter.

  2. Send us a DM with a proper screenshot of the feature and explain what the feature is.

The game will start at 11:45 a.m. EDT!

The winners will be two participants who correctly guess the highest number of features. Submissions will only be accepted via DM to @mondaysupport on Twitter and before 5 p.m. EDT. Winners will be announced and notified at 5:30 p.m. EDT!

Good luck!

Legal: NO PURCHASE NECESSARY. Intended for 18 years and older Participants. Ends on 9.19.2023. For Terms and Conditions, see the attached image. Void where prohibited.

Guess the Feature (X) 2023 Terms and Conditions612×792 112 KB

posts.cookedHtml: gutted i missed this
